value_signal: OpenAI for Startups is a public startup-credits route that asks for a VC referral code, a product description, company contacts, and basic funding details.
eligibility_or_region_notes: Best fit for venture-backed startups that can truthfully supply a VC referral code and basic company/funding details; the page is aimed at teams building with OpenAI.
deadline_or_currentness: Public page is open and current; no close date is stated on the source page.
evidence_gate: Approved application plus visible usable credits or official confirmation.
ai_can_do_next: Audit AI Monkey against the public application requirements and draft a one-page eligibility memo from public facts only.
human_must_do_next: Human owner must confirm the funding history and submit the application if eligible.
automation_boundary: No login, application submission, account creation, passwords, OTP, private keys, KYC, tax, bank, or private data handling.
why_this_is_not_income_yet: The credits and support are real, but no accepted application or usable credit balance has been verified.
suggested_next_check: If the company truthfully has a VC referral path, prepare the shortest public-facts packet for the form.

income_gate.rule: Counts only after approved application or visible usable-credit delivery.
